Compliance & Certifications

AlertMend follows industry best practices and maintains the highest standards of compliance and security to protect your infrastructure data.

Coming Soon

SOC 2 Type II

Following best industry practices for security, availability, and confidentiality. Certification coming soon.

Coming Soon

ISO 27001

Adhering to information security management system best practices. Certification in progress.

GDPR

Following EU General Data Protection Regulation best practices and compliance standards.

HIPAA

Following healthcare data protection best practices. Available on request.
